title: post api upload resume with valid data
description: Test uploading a valid PDF resume file along with a target job title to the /api/upload endpoint. Verify that the response status is 200 and contains a session_id and the first interview question to start the session.

title: post api upload resume with invalid or missing data
description: Test uploading to /api/upload endpoint with missing resume file or invalid form data. Verify that the response status is 400 with a validation error message prompting the user to correct the input.

title: post api upload resume with server parsing failure
description: Simulate a server-side failure during resume parsing when posting to /api/upload. Verify that the response status is 500 and the user is informed that the interview cannot be started at this time.

title: post api chat with valid session and answer
description: Test submitting a valid session_id and candidate answer to /api/chat. Verify that the response status is 200 and returns the next interview question, the current turn number, and interview_complete set to false to continue the interview.

title: post api chat with final answer completing interview
description: Test submitting the final answer for a valid session_id to /api/chat. Verify that the response status is 200 and interview_complete is true, indicating the interview session is complete and report generation will start.

title: post api chat with missing or malformed data
description: Test posting to /api/chat with missing or malformed session_id or answer fields. Verify that the response status is 400 with a validation error requiring properly formatted requests.

title: post api chat with unknown session id
description: Test posting to /api/chat with a session_id that does not exist. Verify that the response status is 404 and the user is informed that the interview session no longer exists.

title: get api report for completed interview
description: Test fetching the interview report from /api/report/{session_id} for a session that has completed and report is ready. Verify that the response status is 200 and contains the report object with scores, strengths, weaknesses, and recommendations.

title: get api report while report is generating
description: Test fetching the interview report immediately after interview completion when the report is still being generated. Verify that the response status is 202 indicating the report is processing and the client should poll again later.

title: get api report with invalid or non existent session id
description: Test fetching the interview report from /api/report/{session_id} with an invalid session_id format or a session_id that does not exist. Verify that the response status is 400 for invalid format or 404 for non-existent session, with appropriate error messages.
